leadText: The Permit (Japanese: きょかしょう License) is a Key Item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Permit allows the player to travel to the Nature Preserve from the airport in Mistralton City .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B2 W2 A permit needed to enter the Nature Preserve. Only a few know about this place. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A permit that is needed to enter the Nature Preserve. Not many know about it. S V A permit that is needed to enter the Nature Preserve, a place that not many people know about.
